mapper.insert: insert into product ( name, details, images, clicks, creattime, originalprice, currentprice, deal, `condition`, address, comments, sid, uid ) values ( #{name}, #{details}, #{images}, #{clicks}, #{creattime}, #{originalprice}, #{currentprice}, #{deal}, #{condition}, #{address}, #{comments}, #{sid}, #{uid} )
mapper.update: update product set name=#{name}, details=#{details}, images=#{images}, clicks=#{clicks}, creattime=#{creattime}, originalprice=#{originalprice}, currentprice=#{currentprice}, deal=#{deal}, `condition`=#{condition}, address=#{address}, comments=#{comments}, sid=#{sid}, uid=#{uid} where id=#{id}
